title: Backtracking
subtitle: Try, fail, undo, try something else

sections.heading: What's backtracking?
sections.body: **Backtracking** explores all options by making a choice, recursing, and **undoing** if it doesn't work. It's how you generate permutations, solve mazes, sudoku, and the classic N-queens puzzle.

sections.title: Solving a maze with breadcrumbs
sections.body: You walk down a path. Hit a dead end. Backtrack to the last fork. Try a different path. Drop breadcrumbs so you don't re-enter what you've already explored. Repeat until you find the exit — or prove there isn't one.
